report.summary: 6th rotation standup — SEC 91-ETF ruling day still no announced results. BTC volatile $66.2K-$68.6K, ETH sub-$2K 2nd day. F&G 10-13 (Extreme Fear 48+ days). Uncommitted files grew to 216 (↑1 from v5's 215). Build v5 produced DeSci + GambleFi guides. 560 published pages, 2 in queue. Deploy remains P0 — 30 agent runs today, all output invisible until git push.

sections.title: Analytics
items: BTC: $66,223-$68,600 range today. Dropped 4% to 2-week low of $66,223 post-$14B options expiry (largest Q1 2026 settlement). Fortune 9AM price: $66,587. Down ~$2,860 from yesterday, ~$20,660 YoY.
ETH: $1,977-$1,989 range. Sub-$2K for 2nd consecutive day. OG ICO whale sold 11,552 ETH ($23.4M). Market cap ~$233B. Down $84.64 from yesterday.

F&G INDEX: 10-13 (Extreme Fear). 48+ consecutive days — longest streak since post-FTX Oct 2022. Multiple sources: CoinMarketCap 13, FearGreedMeter 10, SpotedCrypto reported low of 8 earlier this week.
ETF FLOWS (Mar 26): -$171M to -$340M net outflows (sources vary). Broad-based: IBIT -$41.9M, FBTC -$32.8M, BITB -$33.1M. Coordinated institutional repositioning, not isolated rotation.

SEC ETF RULING — STILL PENDING: 91 applications across 24 tokens. Deadline today. Mar 17 precursor: SEC+CFTC classified 16 cryptos as digital commodities. No approvals or rejections announced as of this cycle. $13.5B options expiry landing same day — two catalysts never co-occurred before.

DELTA FROM v5: BTC range narrowing around $66-68K. ETH stable sub-$2K. F&G unchanged. Build cycle v5 produced 2 new guides (DeSci, GambleFi). Uncommitted files 215→216 (↑1). Published pages steady at 560 with 2 in queue. Still no deploy.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: 5th FULL CYCLE COMPLETED since v5: All 6 agents ran — build-v5, publish-v4, design-v4, community-v5, eod-v6 all completed. Now entering 6th rotation.

BUILD v5: 2 new learn pages — DeSci (Decentralized Science) guide (~3,000 words, VitaDAO, Bio Protocol, ResearchHub, IP-NFTs) and GambleFi (Onchain Betting) guide (~3,200 words, Azuro Protocol, Overtime Markets, LP analysis). Both with Article + FAQ schema.

EOD-QA v6: 560 published slugs (↑2 from v5's 558 — Eclipse SVM + Walrus promoted). 2 new in queue (DeSci, GambleFi). 103 legacy slugs missing page.tsx. 142 TS errors across 5 files (102 in 4 app files — stable). 0/6 API rate-limited.
DESIGN v4: OG images batch + page audits continued. 3 deferred issues from prior cycles (badge fonts, hardcoded colors, mock data).
COMMUNITY v5: Tweet drafts themed on SEC ruling anticipation + fear streak narrative. Social cards + newsletter sections.

BLOCKER [P0]: 216 uncommitted files (↑1 from v5's 215, ↑59 from first cycle's 157). Growth rate slowed this cycle but accumulation continues. ALL new pages, OG images, published-pages.ts updates invisible to production.
BLOCKER [P1]: 0/6 API routes use rate limiter despite src/lib/rate-limiter.ts existing. SEC ruling traffic spike risk.
CARRY-OVER: 102 TS errors (JSX escaping, 4 files), 4/6 API routes missing fallback data, 103 legacy slugs missing page.tsx, 3 deferred UX issues.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — DEPLOY [CRITICAL, 6th CONSECUTIVE CYCLE]: 216 uncommitted files. We've built 12+ learn pages, 60+ OG images, 15+ UX fixes, 20+ tweet drafts today — ALL invisible. SEC ruling results could drop any minute, triggering massive search spikes for exactly the topics we've built pages for. Jefe: git add + commit + push is the single highest-ROI action. Every hour of delay = lost organic traffic on a historic news day.

PRIORITY 2 — SEC RULING REACTIVE CONTENT: Still pending. When results drop, pivot to reactive pages: 'SEC March 27 ETF Ruling: Full Breakdown', 'Which Crypto ETFs Got Approved'. The 4-8 hour post-announcement window is peak search intent. 560 published pages prove shipping velocity — but only if Priority 1 clears first.

PRIORITY 3 — RATE LIMITER ACTIVATION: 0/6 API routes protected. Rate limiter module exists at src/lib/rate-limiter.ts but zero routes import it. SEC ruling traffic spike could exhaust CoinGecko free tier (10-30 calls/min). 10-minute fix, massive downside protection.

report.email: SKIPPED — Chrome extension disconnected (same failure as v2-v5). Resend API fetch cannot execute without active browser tab. Manual send or external trigger needed.
